outcome_note: Validated upstream ROCm support on gfx90a (CDNA2 wave64) + gfx1100 (RDNA3 wave32), ROCm 7.2.1, zero source changes (Strategy B torch-hipify). Notably the 3D path runs correctly on AMD though upstream README disclaims it CUDA-only (rolled back in PR #39). No code delta -> no PR. gfx1151 blocked by an external clang-cl c10 export bug.
